mega_summary: In a significant development, the German Federal Council has approved a bill requiring online shops to display a clear revocation button on their websites or apps within a 14-day withdrawal period, aimed at improving consumer policy and preventing "dark patterns". This move is seen as a major step forward in protecting consumers' rights. Meanwhile, Germany's Champions League teams Borussia Dortmund and Bayer Leverkusen will face off against Atalanta Bergamo from Italy and Olympiakos Piraeus from Greece in upcoming playoff matches. Health concerns are also on the rise, with an increase in respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) cases among infants and children under 4 years old, although serious illnesses remain rare due to vaccination recommendations. Elsewhere, bus drivers in Schleswig-Holstein's county-free cities are going on strike over improved working conditions, while Volkswagen has reopened its iconic glass factory as an event space, marking a shift towards showcasing its brand rather than industrial
